description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 10 hrs 32 mins of coding time, averaging 4 hrs 8 mins per day. His work was spread across 5 projects, with most of the time in Java at 39%, followed by Other at 21%, Markdown at 18%, and TypeScript at 11%. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded in the data for this period.
